chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitution Petition No.D-1073 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of M.A No.3655/22 (S/A). 27-10-2025 None present for petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, A.A.G a/w Aijaz Ali Jamali, Additional Director Colleges Larkana on behalf of respondent No.5. **************** Through this Constitution Petition, the petitioner has challenged respective orders dated 31.03.2022 and 07.04.2022 issued by the respondent No.3, whereby the respondent No.5 was allowed to look after the charge as Director College Education Larkana, Region along with DDO powers of the office of Regional Director Colleges, Larkana. Learned A.A.G files statement on behalf of the respondent No.4, which is taken on record and it reflects that the respondent No.5 has been promoted from the post of Associate Professor (BPS-19) to the post of Professor (BPS-20) vide Notification No.SO-III (SGA&CD)7/1/2023 dated 30.05.2023 and that the post of Regional Director is a BPS-20 position; therefore, the respondent No.5 is legally entitled to hold the said charge. Learned A.A.G submits that in continuation of earlier department’s notification dated 27.5.2024, upon promotion to the post of professor (BPS-20) on regular basis, Mr. Altaf Hussain Abro, Associate professor of political science (BPS-19) has been posted as Regional Director Colleges, Larkana. He further states that the orders under which the respondent No.5 was posted as Regional Director Colleges have been superseded by subsequent notification, and presently, respondent No.5 is not working as Regional Director as the said post is now being hold by Altaf Hussain Abro in terms of notification dated 08.07.2024.

Altaf Hussain Abro, Associate professor of political science (BPS-19) has been posted as Regional Director Colleges, Larkana. He further states that the orders under which the respondent No.5 was posted as Regional Director Colleges have been superseded by subsequent notification, and presently, respondent No.5 is not working as Regional Director as the said post is now being hold by Altaf Hussain Abro in terms of notification dated 08.07.2024. This being position since petition remained unrepresented and in view of notification dated 08.7.2024, this petition has become infructuous. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed as having become infructuous. Judge Judge Irshad Ali M/Steno
